relabelled_senses.definition: A boogie (dance or musical performance) carried out at maximum speed or energy.
Filled to capacity, literally as if the gills (a fish's breathing organs) were full.
The entire amount; the full price or total charge.
Playful activities, amusements, or lighthearted entertainment.
Having a strange or unusual appearance; looking odd or atypical.
A man whose occupation or manner is to make others laugh; a comedian or comic performer.

literal: To be so extremely foul-smelling that it would cause even a dog to gag.

relabelled_senses.definition: To obtain a delay or to postpone action in order to allow more time to prepare or respond; to buy time.
A facial expression adopted to conceal one's emotions or to avoid revealing inner feelings.
A railway track worker, especially a member of a crew who lays, aligns, or maintains railroad rails and ties.
A traffic delay or jam caused by drivers slowing down to look at an accident or other roadside distraction.
To begin to move or to gain forward motion, especially of a vessel.
To initiate or restore the orderly functioning of a meeting, assembly, or court by striking a gavel or similar implement.
A person who dresses in the clothing of another sex or whose appearance deliberately blurs or challenges conventional gender distinctions.

To deliberately subvert, blur, or play with conventional markers of gender identity and gender roles by mixing, exaggerating, or rearranging traits typically associated with masculinity and femininity.
A person who deliberately subverts or disrupts conventional gender identities and roles through their appearance, behavior, or self-presentation.
The idea that the particular combination of genes an individual inherits is determined largely by chance and can confer significant advantages or disadvantages.
A person or animal of great size or physical strength who is nonetheless mild-tempered, kind, and nonthreatening.
the sex characterized by gentleness or mildness
